description: Rise of Avalon Patch 2 (27 August 2020) — Corrupted Dungeon Changes, Disarray Changes, New Castles and Castle Outposts, UI Improvements, Combat Balance Changes (Crossbows, Armors, Helmets, Offhands, Potions), Fixes.

sections.heading: Season 9 Statue Added to Conquerors' Hall
sections.description: Visit Conquerors' Hall in all major Royal Continent cities to see the new statue honoring season winners Elevate. The statue also honors second-place Bloco de Rua and third-place RANG.
sections.searchable_text: Season 9 Statue Conquerors Hall Elevate Bloco de Rua RANG winners

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Changes
items: Infamy loss when killed: 20% → 10%
Infamy gained from killing another player: 10% → 8%
Added flat Infamy bonus to PvP wins by difficulty: Hunter: 300 Infamy | Stalker: 1500 Infamy | Slayer: 6000 Infamy
Adjusted loot scaling based on the increased Infamy pool from these changes
Slayer dungeons now unlock at 100,000 Infamy, but this unlock is now permanent
Players who have already unlocked Slayer level once will have it permanently unlocked retroactively
Matchmaking system adjusted to maintain consistent invasion chance for PvE players while guaranteeing PvP players can find a match
sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeon Changes Infamy loss killed 20% 10% gain killing 10% 8% flat bonus Hunter 300 Stalker 1500 Slayer 6000 loot scaling unlock 100000 permanent retroactively matchmaking invasion PvE PvP

sections.heading: Disarray Changes
sections.description: Disarray (zerg debuff) curve is flattened further and now hard caps at 30% (150 or more players).
items: 50 Players: Disarray Strength 18%
100 Players: Disarray Strength 28%
150 Players: Disarray Strength 30% (hard cap)
sections.searchable_text: Disarray zerg debuff curve flattened hard cap 30% 150 players 50 players 18% 100 players 28% Season 10

sections.heading: New Castles and Castle Outposts Added
sections.description: 5 new Castles and 20 new Castle Outposts have been added to the Outlands.
items: New Castles: Drownfield Course (15:00 UTC), Greenshore Peninsula (3:00 UTC), Sunstrand Delta (3:00 UTC), Highstone Meadow (0:00 UTC), Gravemound Cliffs (5:00 UTC)

New Castle Outposts: Wetgrave Swale (21:00), Brambleshore Hinterlands (21:00), Southgrove Escarp (3:00), Giantweald Woods (15:00), Timberscar Copse (15:00), Timbertop Escarp (18:00), Swiftsands Plain (21:00), Thirstwater Steppe (0:00), Drytop Riverbed (18:00), Thirstwater Waste (21:00), Farshore Lagoon (15:00), Slakesands Mesa (5:00), Sandmount Desert (15:00), Highstone Grassland (3:00), Gravemound Brim (3:00), Stonelake Hillock (15:00), Everwinter Passage (21:00), Munten Fell (3:00), Frostseep Crevasse (18:00), Whitecliff Expanse (21:00)
sections.searchable_text: New Castles Castle Outposts Outlands Drownfield Course Greenshore Peninsula Sunstrand Delta Highstone Meadow Gravemound Cliffs Wetgrave Swale Brambleshore Timberscar Timbertop Swiftsands Thirstwater Drytop Farshore Slakesands Sandmount Gravemound Stonelake Everwinter Munten Frostseep Whitecliff

sections.heading: UI Improvements and Fixes
items: Scoreboard (Arena / Crystal League / City Fights): now updates with each new player who joins, ensuring equipment is displayed correctly for early joiners and average player item power is always updated
Hellgates: improved gear warning messages
sections.searchable_text: UI Improvements Scoreboard Arena Crystal League City Fights equipment item power Hellgates gear warning

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Increased overall spawn numbers for Hellgates (2v2 and 5v5) to compensate for increased numbers of Hellgate spawn areas due to Roads of Avalon
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Hellgates spawn numbers 2v2 5v5 Roads of Avalon

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Crossbows Armors Helmets Offhands Potions

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Knockback Shot skillshot Range 8m 14m Hit delay 0.1s 0.2s Standtime 0.2s 0.4s Cooldown 8s 12s Exploding Shot Light Crossbow DoT Emergency Heal Explosion Damage 201.96 180.00

changes.raw_text: Knockback Shot (all Crossbows): Ability is now an aimed skillshot instead of a direct enemy-targeted cast. Range: 8m → 14m; Hit delay: 0.1s → 0.2s; Standtime: 0.2s → 0.4s; Cooldown: 8s → 12s
notes: Ability is now an aimed skillshot instead of a direct enemy-targeted cast

changes.raw_text: Exploding Shot (Light Crossbow): No longer classified as DoT — can no longer be removed by Emergency Heal. Explosion Damage: 201.96 → 180.00
notes: No longer classified as DoT — can no longer be removed by Emergency Heal

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Everlasting Spirit Cleric Robe activation purged Purging Shield Mage Robe direct damage ability auto attack DoTs Reflected Damage purge

changes.raw_text: Everlasting Spirit (Cleric Robe): Activation phase no longer counts as a buff and thus can't be purged
notes: Activation phase no longer counts as a buff and thus can't be purged

changes.raw_text: Purging Shield (Mage Robe): The purge now is only activated by direct damage, either by an ability or auto attack. DoTs or Reflected Damage no longer trigger the purge.
notes: The purge now is only activated by direct damage (ability or auto attack)
DoTs or Reflected Damage no longer trigger the purge

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Emergency Heal Guardian Helmet Healing value modifiers Heal value 10% 12%

changes.raw_text: Emergency Heal (Guardian Helmet): Healing value no longer scales with healing modifiers. Heal value: 10% → 12%
notes: Healing value no longer scales with healing modifiers

subsections.heading: Offhands
subsections.searchable_text: Offhands Taproot Max Health Health Regen Factor 0.42 0.3

changes.raw_text: Taproot: Max Health and Health Regen Factor: 0.42 → 0.3

stats.name: Max Health and Health Regen Factor

subsections.heading: Potions
subsections.searchable_text: Potions Healing Potions healing value modifiers

changes.raw_text: Healing Potions: Healing value no longer scales with healing modifiers
notes: Healing value no longer scales with healing modifiers

sections.heading: Fixes
items: "Recover All" now works when recovering items from a destroyed Hideout as intended
Portal Shrines can now be used only once every 10 minutes as intended
Fame for killing Faction Warfare bosses has been returned to its previous intended level
Fame for killing some Hellgate mobs has been returned to its previous intended level
Players can now use Tier 4 and 5 Solo Dungeon Maps in eligible Roads of Avalon zones as intended
Fixed an issue where the option to respawn in Last City did not appear after dying in the Roads of Avalon if "Home" option was present
An unlimited number of players can now use the speed boost areas in the Roads of Avalon as intended
Fixed an issue where players who entered an Expedition or the Arena from an island would become stuck
Fixed an issue where Divine Engine ability (Energy Shaper) could be cleansed, causing it to deal no damage
Flash Heal (Holy Staffs) has been completely removed from the game, resolving an issue where this ability could sometimes still be triggered
Fixed an issue where Motivating Cleanse (Arcane Staffs) affected more than the intended 5 players
Fixed an issue where the UI of Hideouts in Roads of Avalon could not be opened from the Guild Estates menu
[Mobile] Fixed an issue where dragging of Wardrobe and Mount Skins was sometimes not possible
[Mobile] Fixed an issue where auto-targeting was able to target unhittable enemies
Additional graphical, animation, terrain, and localization fixes
